name: OnIpSendPrepare
title: OnIpSendPrepare
syntax: long OnIpSendPrepare( dword socket, ethernetPacket * packet);
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called right before a packet will be sent by the TCP/IP stack.
It is possible to manipulate the content of the packet or to block the sending of the package on the bus.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: The Ethernet packet which will be send.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
